PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Continued To Mar-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mark S. Bridges, Esq. for Irene Tan Luy.

Mr. Bridges stated that they hadn't sent notice to the Philippine Consulate General, that he sent the information to the Examiner, that he immediately gave notice of the hearing, and that they didn't have the new hearing date. Mr. Bridges argued that the Philippine Consulate General hasn't filed anything, that they have had four weeks to do so, that the heirs are his client and her four children, that his client likes to file her taxes early, and that his client is nervous about getting her taxes done. Brief discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court continued the matter to March 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to the Philippine Consulate General.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
